top_signals.title: Wendy’s Shares Set to Extend Rally as Meme-Stock Crowd Piles In
top_signals.summary: Shares of Wendy’s Co. are poised to extend their advance for a second day as the meme-stock crowd pushes the iconic American burger chain stock even higher.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Venezuela Earthquake Death Toll Rises to at Least 164
top_signals.summary: At least 164 people are dead and 1,000 injured after back-to-back earthquakes struck Venezuela on Wednesday. Buildings have collapsed and roads buckled. People took to the streets and looked for cover. A magnitude 7.2 earthquake struck first followed by a magnitude 7.5 quake less than a minute later west of Caracas. The US is sending search-and-rescue teams to help. (Source: Bloomberg)
